data.title: Configurable approach resolution strategy for implementation-plan
data.description:
## Context
When a plugin user invokes /dso:implementation-plan directly to plan a story or epic, the skill always prompts them to manually select from generated proposals — even though the dso:approach-decision-maker agent could handle this autonomously. The resolution strategy is hardwired by caller context: /dso:sprint gets autonomous resolution, direct invocations get interactive. This forces users who prefer autonomous resolution to run /dso:sprint even for simple planning tasks, adding unnecessary ceremony.

## Success Criteria
1. dso-config.conf supports an implementation_plan.approach_resolution key with values autonomous and interactive, defaulting to autonomous when absent
2. When autonomous, implementation-plan dispatches dso:approach-decision-maker for proposal resolution without prompting the user on the happy path; the existing escalation path (user escalation after 2 counter-proposal cycles without selection) is preserved as a safety valve regardless of config value
3. When interactive, implementation-plan displays proposals to the user and waits for manual selection without dispatching the decision-maker agent, regardless of how it was invoked
4. The sprint-vs-standalone context detection logic for approach resolution is removed from implementation-plan/SKILL.md — the config key is the sole routing signal
5. Invoking /dso:implementation-plan directly with the default config (autonomous) produces an APPROACH_DECISION output without a user prompt, verifiable by checking for the APPROACH_DECISION prefix in task output

## Scenario Analysis
- Sprint-context interactive mode blocks pipeline (critical): If a user sets interactive mode and runs /dso:sprint, the skill halts at proposal display with no STATUS signal sprint can parse
- Missing config key defaults to autonomous silently (high): Standalone callers who relied on implicit interactive default get autonomous behavior without notice
- Interactive mode skips decision-maker agent (high): interactive means skip agent dispatch — user selects directly from proposals

## Dependencies
None

## Approach
Add implementation_plan.approach_resolution=autonomous to dso-config.conf. Modify the Proposal Generation and Resolution Loop sections of implementation-plan/SKILL.md to read this config key and route accordingly, removing all sprint-vs-standalone context detection for approach resolution. The escalation escape hatch (user escalation after 2 failed cycles) is preserved regardless of config value.

### Planning Intelligence Log

- Web research (Step 2.6): not triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: none
- Scenario analysis (Step 2.75): triggered
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 3 (capped from 4, reduced mode)
- Practitioner-requested additional cycles: none
